title: scroll-snap
description: scroll-snap-type on a container and scroll-snap-align on children create CSS-only snap scrolling. Cards click into place as you scroll — no JavaScript needed.
html:
1
2
3
4
5
challenge: The container already has scroll-snap-type set, but scrolling still drifts freely. Each card needs to declare where it snaps. Add scroll-snap-align: start to .card.

alternatives.name: scroll-snap-align: center
alternatives.description: center snaps the card's midpoint to the container's midpoint. Use this when you want the active card centered in view rather than aligned to the left edge.

realWorldUsage: Mobile-style card carousels, onboarding step sequences, and image galleries — any horizontally scrolling list where each item should click cleanly into view. Also used vertically on full-page scroll sites where sections snap to the viewport.
